•Story-driven visual novel experience

•Daily life and event scenarios set in an otherworldly world

•Multi-ending structure driven by player choices

•79 CG events (variations not included)

•20 endings 

Voice Cast

Yoichi: Voiced by Yusei Nogi 

Ryuji / Tsukiyomi: Voiced by Yuris Prince 

Shopkeeper / Shiro Usagi: Voiced by Setsugekka 

Tobiume: Voiced by Yuki Tachibana
description_short: "Guardian of the Sacred Seal" is a story-driven adventure game centered on the concept: “To be unconditionally loved by a yandere young man.” In the otherworldly paradise of Gokurakudō, a young girl partners with a mysterious man to handle seemingly ordinary requests that hide deeper secrets.
